arts.ttl: Manchester United suffer new Luke Shaw setback
arts.sum: Luke Shaw has not played for Man United since February 18 after he suffered a calf injury on his first week back for pre-season.

arts.ttl: Pictured: Man United's £2bn, 100,000-seat new Old Trafford idea is revealed in more images from their regeneration plan video
arts.sum: Images have been produced of how the potential £2billion stadium could look as part of the regeneration project, with Manchester United vowing to deliver a world class venue.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Arsenal lead Man Utd in Sesko race; Liverpool want 3 Leverkusen players
arts.sum: Real Madrid are planning to strengthen their defence next summer with two free transfers - Trent Alexander-Arnold from Liverpool and Alphonso Davies from Bayern Munich . Another defender Real Madrid want to sign is Nottingham Forest centre-back Murillo, with Barcelona and Bayern Munich also interested.

arts.ttl: Erik Ten Hag Drops Luke Shaw Man Utd Injury Update
arts.sum: Erik Ten Hag has dropped a major update on the fitness of Manchester United left-back Luke Shaw following his hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Man Utd share 1st images of stadium regen plans
arts.sum: Manchester United have revealed the first images of the potential Old Trafford regeneration project.

arts.ttl: Phil Jones reveals moment he realised his Man United career was over amid injury nightmare - after hoping for a 'fresh start' under Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Jones made 229 appearances for the club since signing from Blackburn Rovers , but was restricted to just 13 appearances in his final four years at the club due to injuries.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe and INEOS' Old Trafford Plans for Man Utd
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe and INEOS have major plans to improve Manchester United's home, Old Trafford, in the future.

arts.ttl: Danny Murphy points out glaring Man Utd issue that Erik ten Hag has failed to solve
arts.sum: Former Liverpool midfielder Danny Murphy believes Manchester United will "struggle" to finish in the top four this season after failing to sign a genuine goalscorer

arts.ttl: Iconic Premier League goalkeeper issues damning Andre Onana assessment - 'I'm frustrated'
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana has struggled to live up to expectations since joining the club last year and has now been called out by former England stopper David James

arts.ttl: Man United new stadium latest – Old Trafford plans, first pictures and cost
arts.sum: Gary Neville and Andy Burnham have reacted to Manchester United's plans to redevelop Old Trafford as part of a new stadium project
